name: replace_cell
description: Replace the content (and optionally language) of an existing cell at the given index in a Jupyter notebook (.ipynb) using the Notebook API.

code.description: New code or markdown content for the cell.

index.description: 0-based index of the cell to edit.

languageId.description: Optional new language ID for the cell (e.g., "python", "sql", "markdown"). If not provided, retains the existing language.

path.description: Absolute path to the .ipynb file on disk.
